-
-        WorkflowEvent::SnapshotTaken { .. } => handlers::handle_snapshot(state, seq),
-
-        _ => handlers::handle_generic_event(state, seq),
-    };
-
-    Ok(result)
+    Ok((Default::default(), Default::default())) /* ~ changed by cargo-mutants ~ */
 }
